101.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abdullah ibn Ja'far (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ once took him up behind him on a mount and whispered something to him that he would not tell anyone. The most beloved place for the Prophet ﷺ to answer the call of nature was a raised mound or a grove of palm trees.
101.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abdullah ibn Ja'far (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ suatu hari memboncengnya di belakang kendaraan dan berbisik kepadanya sesuatu yang tidak akan dia ceritakan kepada siapapun. Tempat yang paling disukai Nabi ﷺ untuk buang hajat adalah dataran tinggi atau kebun kurma.

102.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) that Umar asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ: 'I become junub at night, what should I do?' He ﷺ commanded him to wash his private parts, perform ablution, and then sleep.
102.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Umar bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ: 'Aku junub di malam hari, apa yang harus aku lakukan?' Beliau ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk mencuci kemaluannya, berwudhu, kemudian tidur.

103.iwh_en: It was narrated that someone asked Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her): 'What would the Messenger of Allah ﷺ do when he wanted to sleep while he was junub?' She said: 'He would perform ablution and then sleep.'
103.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seseorang bertanya kepada Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha): 'Apa yang Rasulullah ﷺ lakukan ketika ingin tidur dalam keadaan junub?' Dia berkata: 'Beliau berwudhu kemudian tidur.'

104.iwh_en: It was narrated that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Water is required only from water' — meaning ghusl is required only when seminal discharge occurs.
104.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Air hanya dari air' — maksudnya mandi wajib hanya diperlukan ketika terjadi keluarnya air mani.

105.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the ruling they used to give — 'water is only from water' — was a concession that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave in the early days of Islam, but he then commanded that ghusl is required in any case of penetration even without ejaculation.
105.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa fatwa yang dulu mereka berikan — 'air hanya dari air' — adalah keringanan yang diberikan Rasulullah ﷺ pada awal Islam, tetapi kemudian beliau memerintahkan bahwa mandi wajib diperlukan dalam setiap kasus penetrasi meskipun tanpa ejakulasi.

106.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ubayy ibn Ka'b (may Allah be pleased with him) that the ruling 'water is only from water' was a concession that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave, then later abrogated it. This is a parallel chain narration confirming the same ruling.
106.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ubayy ibn Ka'b (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa hukum 'air hanya dari air' adalah keringanan yang diberikan Rasulullah ﷺ, kemudian beliau menghapusnya. Ini adalah sanad paralel yang mengonfirmasi hukum yang sama.

107.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When he sits between her four parts and exerts himself, ghusl becomes obligatory.'
107.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila dia duduk di antara empat bagiannya dan berusaha keras, maka mandi wajib menjadi wajib.'

108.iwh_en: It was narrated from Khawlah bint Hakim al-Sulamiyyah (may Allah be pleased with her) that she asked the Messenger of Allah ﷺ about a woman who sees in her dream what a man sees — meaning she has a wet dream. He said: 'She should perform ghusl.' Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) objected and said: 'Uff! Do you think a woman experiences that?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ turned to her and said: 'May your right hand be soiled — so from where does her child resemble her?'
108.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Khawlah binti Hakim al-Sulamiyyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dia bertanya kepada Rasulullah ﷺ tentang seorang wanita yang melihat dalam mimpinya apa yang dilihat pria — yaitu mimpi basah. Beliau bersabda: 'Dia harus mandi.' Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) keberatan dan berkata: 'Uff! Apakah kamu pikir wanita mengalami itu?' Rasulullah ﷺ berpaling kepadanya dan bersabda: 'Semoga tangan kananmu berlepotan — lalu dari mana anaknya menyerupainya?'

109.iwh_en: It was narrated that a woman asked about whether a woman has wet dreams. When the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Yes,' Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) expressed disapproval. The Prophet ﷺ told her that the child resembles the mother because of her fluid, indicating that women do experience nocturnal emission.
109.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang wanita bertanya tentang apakah wanita mengalami mimpi basah. Ketika Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Ya,' Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) menunjukkan ketidaksetujuan. Nabi ﷺ memberitahunya bahwa anak menyerupai ibunya karena cairan ibunya, menunjukkan bahwa wanita memang mengalami mimpi basah.

110.iwh_en: It was narrated from Anas ibn Malik (may Allah be pleased with him) that Umm Sulaym came to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ while Umm Salamah was with him, and asked: 'Does a woman have to perform ghusl if she has a wet dream?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Yes, if she sees water.' Umm Salamah laughed and covered her face, saying: 'O Messenger of Allah, does a woman have a wet dream?' He said: 'Yes, may your right hand be soiled — otherwise how would her child resemble her?'
110.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Anas ibn Malik (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Umm Sulaim datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ sementara Umm Salamah bersamanya, dan bertanya: 'Apakah seorang wanita harus mandi jika dia bermimpi basah?' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ya, jika dia melihat air.' Umm Salamah tertawa dan menutupi wajahnya, berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, apakah wanita bermimpi basah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Ya, semoga tangan kananmu berlepotan — lalu bagaimana anaknya bisa menyerupainya?'

111.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said regarding wet dreams: 'He should perform ghusl. But if he sees that he had a wet dream yet finds no wetness, then ghusl is not required.'
111.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda mengenai mimpi basah: 'Dia harus mandi. Tetapi jika dia melihat bahwa dia telah bermimpi basah namun tidak menemukan kelembaban, maka mandi tidak diperlukan.'

112.iwh_en: It was narrated from Abu Hurayrah (may Allah be pleased with him) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When one of you wakes from sleep, he should not dip his hand into the ablution water until he has washed it three times, for he does not know where his hand has been during the night.'
112.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Abu Hurairah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila salah seorang dari kalian bangun dari tidur, janganlah dia mencelupkan tangannya ke dalam air wudhu hingga dia mencucinya tiga kali, karena dia tidak tahu di mana tangannya berada selama malam.'

113.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that they were with the Prophet ﷺ when he went to relieve himself. When he came back, food was brought to him. It was said: 'Will you not perform ablution?' He said: 'Am I going to pray? Should I perform ablution?' — indicating that ablution is not required simply for eating.
113.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa mereka bersama Nabi ﷺ ketika beliau pergi buang hajat. Ketika kembali, makanan dibawa kepadanya. Dikatakan: 'Tidakkah engkau berwudhu?' Beliau bersabda: 'Apakah aku akan shalat? Haruskah aku berwudhu?' — menunjukkan bahwa wudhu tidak diperlukan hanya untuk makan.

114.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Umm Habibah bint Jahsh suffered from abnormal uterine bleeding (istihadah) for seven years while she was married to Abd al-Rahman ibn Awf. She complained about it to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he said to her: 'This is not menstruation but a vein. So perform ghusl and pray.'
114.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Umm Habibah binti Jahsy menderita pendarahan rahim abnormal (istihadhah) selama tujuh tahun sementara dia menikah dengan Abdurrahman ibn Awf. Dia mengadukan hal ini kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau berkata kepadanya: 'Ini bukan haid melainkan urat. Maka mandilah dan shalatlahlah.'

115.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to have intimate contact with his wives while he was fasting.
115.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa bercumbu dengan istri-istrinya sementara beliau sedang berpuasa.

116.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to have intimate contact with his wives while fasting, and he was the most in control of his desires among you.
116.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa bercumbu dengan istri-istrinya saat berpuasa, dan beliau adalah orang yang paling mampu mengendalikan syahwatnya di antara kalian.

117.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said to her: 'Hand me the cloth' — when she was menstruating. She said: 'I am menstruating.' He said: 'It is not in your hand.'
117.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Berikan aku kain itu' — ketika dia sedang haid. Dia berkata: 'Aku sedang haid.' Beliau bersabda: 'Itu bukan di tanganmu.'

118.iwh_en: It was narrated from Asma bint Abi Bakr (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said regarding menstrual blood on a garment: 'If you see blood on it, scrape it off, then scratch it, then sprinkle water on the rest of the garment, and then pray in it.'
118.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Asma binti Abi Bakr (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda mengenai darah haid di pakaian: 'Jika kamu melihat darah padanya, kerik, kemudian gosok, kemudian percikkan air pada sisa pakaian itu, kemudian shalatlah di dalamnya.'

119.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha, Mother of the Believers (may Allah be pleased with her), that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to a woman who had finished her menses: 'Take your water and sidr, then bathe and clean yourself thoroughly, then pour water over your head until it reaches the roots of the hair, then take a cotton ball with musk.' She asked: 'How should I use it, O Messenger of Allah?' He said: 'Purify yourself with it.' She asked again. He said: 'Subhanallah! Purify yourself!' Aisha pulled her aside and showed her how to wipe away the traces of blood.
119.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah, Ummul Mukminin (radhiyallahu 'anha), bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepada seorang wanita yang selesai haid: 'Ambil air dan sidrahmu, lalu mandilah dan bersihkan dirimu, kemudian tuangkan air ke atas kepalamu hingga mencapai akar rambut, kemudian ambil kapas yang dilumuri musk.' Wanita itu bertanya: 'Bagaimana aku menggunakannya, wahai Rasulullah?' Beliau bersabda: 'Bersucilah dengannya.' Aisyah menariknya ke samping dan menunjukkan cara membersihkan bekas darah.

120.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'No, it is just a vein. When menstruation comes, stop the prayer, and when it goes away, wash the blood from yourself and pray.'
120.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak, itu hanyalah urat. Apabila haid datang, tinggalkan shalat, dan apabila berlalu, basuh darah dari dirimu dan shalatlahlah.'

121.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a daughter of Jahsh suffered from abnormal uterine bleeding in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. She consulted him and he commanded her to perform ghusl and pray, for it is just a vein.
121.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang putri Jahsy menderita pendarahan rahim abnormal pada zaman Rasulullah ﷺ. Dia berkonsultasi dengan beliau dan beliau memerintahkannya untuk mandi dan shalat, karena itu hanyalah urat.

122.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ first commanded the woman with abnormal bleeding to perform ghusl for every prayer. When this became too burdensome for her, he commanded her to combine Dhuhr and Asr prayers with one ghusl, and Maghrib and Isha with one ghusl, and perform ablution for Fajr.
122.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ pertama memerintahkan wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal untuk mandi setiap shalat. Ketika ini menjadi terlalu memberatkan baginya, beliau memerintahkannya untuk menggabungkan shalat Zuhur dan Ashar dengan satu mandi, dan Maghrib dan Isya dengan satu mandi, dan berwudhu untuk Subuh.

123.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a woman suffered from abnormal bleeding in the time of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ. She came to the Prophet ﷺ and he said: 'She should sit for as many days as her period normally lasts each month, then perform ghusl and pray.'
123.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang wanita menderita pendarahan abnormal pada zaman Rasulullah ﷺ. Dia datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan beliau bersabda: 'Dia harus duduk (tidak shalat) selama hari-hari yang biasanya menjadi haidnya setiap bulan, kemudian mandi dan shalat.'

124.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Umm Habibah bint Jahsh suffered from abnormal bleeding for seven years while married to Abd al-Rahman ibn Awf. She complained to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ who said: 'This is not menstruation — it is only a vein. Perform ghusl and pray.' She used to perform ghusl for every prayer.
124.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Umm Habibah binti Jahsy menderita pendarahan abnormal selama tujuh tahun sementara menikah dengan Abdurrahman ibn Awf. Dia mengadukan kepada Rasulullah ﷺ yang bersabda: 'Ini bukan haid — ini hanyalah urat. Mandilah dan shalatlahlah.' Dia biasa mandi untuk setiap shalat.

125.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'No, it is just a vein and it is not menstruation. When menstruation comes, stop the prayer. When its normal duration passes, wash the blood from yourself, perform ablution, and pray.' Abu Muhammad said: 'This is more comprehensive than the previous narration.'
125.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Tidak, itu hanya urat dan bukan haid. Apabila haid datang, tinggalkan shalat. Apabila durasinya yang normal berlalu, basuh darah dari dirimu, berwudhu, dan shalatlahlah.' Abu Muhammad berkata: 'Ini lebih komprehensif dari riwayat sebelumnya.'

126.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Salamah, wife of the Prophet (may Allah be pleased with her), regarding a woman who suffered from abnormal bleeding. The Messenger of Allah ﷺ commanded her to count the days and nights of her normal period each month, then stop praying for those days, then after that to perform ghusl and use a cloth, and to pray.
126.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Salamah, istri Nabi ﷺ (radhiyallahu 'anha), mengenai seorang wanita yang menderita pendarahan abnormal. Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkannya untuk menghitung hari dan malam haid normalnya setiap bulan, kemudian berhenti shalat untuk hari-hari tersebut, kemudian setelah itu mandi dan menggunakan kain, dan shalat.

127.iwh_en: It was narrated from Umm Habibah (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said to her: 'Perform ghusl and pray.'
127.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Umm Habibah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata kepadanya: 'Mandilah dan shalatlahlah.'

128.iwh_en: It was narrated from Amrah bint Abd al-Rahman ibn Sa'd ibn Zurarah that she heard that a woman had abnormal bleeding and the scholars were asked about her. Urwah ibn al-Zubayr passed this information on, indicating the Prophet ﷺ's ruling that such a woman should sit for her normal period days and then perform ghusl and pray.
128.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Amrah binti Abdurrahman ibn Sa'd ibn Zurarah bahwa dia mendengar tentang seorang wanita yang mengalami pendarahan abnormal dan para ulama ditanya tentangnya. Urwah ibn al-Zubair meneruskan informasi ini, menunjukkan hukum Nabi ﷺ bahwa wanita seperti itu harus duduk selama hari-hari haid normalnya kemudian mandi dan shalat.

129.iwh_en: It was narrated that scholars discussed which woman who suffered from abnormal bleeding in the time of Abd al-Rahman ibn Awf was meant in the narrations. Some said it was Umm Habibah, some said it was another woman. The report clarifies that all three women were married to Abd al-Rahman ibn Awf, and their identities were confused in transmission.
129.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa para ulama mendiskusikan wanita mana yang menderita pendarahan abnormal pada masa Abdurrahman ibn Awf yang dimaksud dalam riwayat-riwayat. Sebagian mengatakan itu adalah Umm Habibah, sebagian lagi mengatakan itu adalah wanita lain. Laporan ini menjelaskan bahwa ketiga wanita tersebut menikah dengan Abdurrahman ibn Awf, dan identitas mereka tertukar dalam periwayatan.

130.iwh_en: It was narrated that a scholar said: 'O nephew, no one knows more about this than I do: when menstruation comes, she should stop the prayer, and when it goes away, she should perform ghusl and pray.'
130.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang ulama berkata: 'Wahai keponakanku, tidak ada yang lebih tahu tentang ini dariku: apabila haid datang, dia harus berhenti shalat, dan apabila berlalu, dia harus mandi dan shalat.'

131.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) that the ruling on abnormal bleeding applies even if the blood flows like a channel — the woman must still observe her normal menstrual period and then resume prayer.
131.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) bahwa hukum pendarahan abnormal berlaku bahkan jika darah mengalir seperti saluran — wanita tersebut tetap harus menjalankan masa haid normalnya kemudian melanjutkan shalat.

132.iwh_en: It was narrated that Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) was among the most strict in rulings regarding the woman with abnormal bleeding, then he later gave a concession. A woman came to him and asked: 'May I enter the Ka'bah while I am menstruating?' He gave her permission, indicating flexibility in some rulings.
132.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) termasuk yang paling ketat dalam hukum mengenai wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal, kemudian belakangan dia memberikan keringanan. Seorang wanita datang kepadanya dan bertanya: 'Bolehkah aku masuk Ka'bah sementara aku sedang haid?' Dia memberinya izin, menunjukkan fleksibilitas dalam beberapa hukum.

133.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked about the woman with abnormal bleeding. She said: 'She should wait for the days of her menstrual period during which she used to stop the prayer before. When the day of her purity comes — the day she used to become pure — she should perform ghusl, use a cloth, and pray.'
133.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dia ditanya tentang wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal. Dia berkata: 'Dia harus menunggu hari-hari masa haidnya di mana dia biasa berhenti shalat sebelumnya. Ketika hari kesuciannya tiba — hari di mana dia biasa menjadi suci — dia harus mandi, menggunakan kain, dan shalat.'

134.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) about the woman with abnormal bleeding that she should wait for the days when she normally stops prayer, then perform ghusl and pray during the other days. This is a parallel chain confirming the same ruling.
134.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) tentang wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal bahwa dia harus menunggu hari-hari di mana dia biasa berhenti shalat, kemudian mandi dan shalat pada hari-hari lainnya. Ini adalah sanad paralel yang mengonfirmasi hukum yang sama.

135.iwh_en: It was narrated that the ruling on the woman with abnormal bleeding is: she should stop prayer for the days of her normal menstrual period each month. When those days end, she should perform ghusl, pray, fast, and perform ablution for each prayer.
135.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa hukum wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal adalah: dia harus berhenti shalat selama hari-hari masa haid normalnya setiap bulan. Ketika hari-hari tersebut berakhir, dia harus mandi, shalat, puasa, dan berwudhu untuk setiap shalat.

136.iwh_en: It was narrated from al-Hasan regarding the woman with abnormal bleeding who knows the days of her menstrual period, when she is divorced and the bleeding continues for a long time: she should observe the rulings of normal menstruation during her known days, then perform ghusl and treat the remaining bleeding as abnormal.
136.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari al-Hasan mengenai wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal yang mengetahui hari-hari masa haidnya, ketika dia diceraikan dan pendarahan berlanjut dalam waktu lama: dia harus menjalankan hukum haid normal selama hari-hari yang diketahuinya, kemudian mandi dan memperlakukan pendarahan yang tersisa sebagai pendarahan abnormal.

137.iwh_en: It was narrated that Qatadah was asked: 'A woman whose menstrual period is known, but it has extended by five, four, or three days — what should she do?' He said: 'She should pray.' He was asked: 'Two days?' He gave the same answer, indicating that extension beyond the normal days requires prayer.
137.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Qatadah ditanya: 'Seorang wanita yang masa haidnya diketahui, tetapi telah memanjang lima, empat, atau tiga hari — apa yang harus dia lakukan?' Dia berkata: 'Dia harus shalat.' Ditanya: 'Dua hari?' Dia memberikan jawaban yang sama, menunjukkan bahwa perpanjangan di luar hari normal mengharuskan shalat.

138.iwh_en: It was narrated that a scholar said regarding the woman with abnormal bleeding: 'I believe she should perform ghusl and pray.'
138.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang ulama berkata mengenai wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal: 'Aku berpendapat dia harus mandi dan shalat.'

139.iwh_en: It was narrated that Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) was asked about the woman with abnormal bleeding. He said: 'She should wait for the duration of her normal period, then treat it as ended. She should perform ghusl and pray. When her period time comes again, she should stop.'
139.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) ditanya tentang wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal. Dia berkata: 'Dia harus menunggu selama masa haid normalnya, kemudian memperlakukannya sebagai selesai. Dia harus mandi dan shalat. Ketika waktu haidnya datang lagi, dia harus berhenti.'

140.iwh_en: It was narrated that Abu Ja'far said regarding the woman with abnormal bleeding: 'She should stop prayer for the days of her menstrual period, then when those end, she should perform ghusl and pray.' This ruling is from the scholars of early Islam.
140.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Abu Ja'far berkata mengenai wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal: 'Dia harus berhenti shalat selama hari-hari masa haidnya, kemudian ketika berakhir, dia harus mandi dan shalat.' Hukum ini berasal dari ulama Islam awal.

141.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The woman with abnormal bleeding should sit for the days of her menstrual period, then perform one ghusl, and then perform ablution for every prayer.'
141.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa dia berkata: 'Wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal harus duduk (tidak shalat) selama hari-hari masa haidnya, kemudian mandi sekali, lalu berwudhu untuk setiap shalat.'

142.iwh_en: It was narrated that a woman from the family of Anas suffered from abnormal bleeding. Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) was asked about it and said: 'As long as she sees thick dark blood, she should not pray. When she sees purity — even for an hour — she should perform ghusl and pray.'
142.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang wanita dari keluarga Anas menderita pendarahan abnormal. Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) ditanya tentang itu dan berkata: 'Selama dia melihat darah merah kehitaman yang kental, dia tidak boleh shalat. Ketika dia melihat kesucian — meskipun hanya sebentar — dia harus mandi dan shalat.'

143.iwh_en: It was narrated that a slave woman of Anas ibn Malik suffered from abnormal bleeding. The narrator was asked to seek a ruling from Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father). He said: 'When she sees thick dark blood, she should not pray. When she sees that she has become pure, she should perform ghusl and pray.'
143.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa budak perempuan Anas ibn Malik menderita pendarahan abnormal. Perawi diminta mencari fatwa dari Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma). Dia berkata: 'Ketika dia melihat darah merah kehitaman yang kental, dia tidak boleh shalat. Ketika dia melihat bahwa dirinya telah suci, dia harus mandi dan shalat.'

144.iwh_en: It was narrated from a scholar that the ruling on abnormal bleeding is: 'When you see fresh red blood, hold back during the days of your normal period.'
144.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari seorang ulama bahwa hukum pendarahan abnormal adalah: 'Apabila kamu melihat darah merah segar, tahanlah selama hari-hari masa haid normalmu.'

145.iwh_en: It was narrated that Sufyan said: 'The woman with abnormal bleeding should sit for the days of her menstrual period, then perform one ghusl for Dhuhr and Asr, delay Maghrib and advance Isha — performing that within the time of Isha — and perform one ghusl for Fajr.'
145.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Sufyan berkata: 'Wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal harus duduk (tidak shalat) selama hari-hari masa haidnya, kemudian mandi sekali untuk Zuhur dan Ashar, mengakhirkan Maghrib dan mempercepat Isya — melakukan itu dalam waktu Isya — dan mandi sekali untuk Subuh.'

146.iwh_en: It was narrated that Ibn Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him and his father) used to say about the woman with abnormal bleeding: 'She should perform one ghusl for Dhuhr and Asr combined, and one ghusl for Maghrib and Isha combined.' He also used to say that she should delay Maghrib and advance Isha, performing them together.
146.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Ibn Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhuma) biasa berkata tentang wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal: 'Dia harus mandi sekali untuk Zuhur dan Ashar yang digabungkan, dan mandi sekali untuk Maghrib dan Isya yang digabungkan.' Dia juga biasa berkata bahwa dia harus mengakhirkan Maghrib dan mempercepat Isya, melakukan keduanya bersama-sama.

147.iwh_en: It was narrated from Mujahid regarding the woman with abnormal bleeding when her menstrual days have passed: 'When the time of Asr comes, she should perform a thorough ablution — or he said ghusl — then pray Dhuhr and Asr together, and similarly for the other prayers.'
147.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Mujahid mengenai wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal ketika hari-hari haidnya telah berlalu: 'Ketika waktu Ashar tiba, dia harus berwudhu secara menyeluruh — atau dia berkata mandi — kemudian shalat Zuhur dan Ashar bersama-sama, dan demikian pula untuk shalat-shalat lainnya.'

148.iwh_en: It was narrated from Ata, Sa'id, and Ikrimah that they said regarding the woman with abnormal bleeding: 'She should perform ghusl every day for each of the five prayers.'
148.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Atha, Sa'id, dan Ikrimah bahwa mereka berkata mengenai wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal: 'Dia harus mandi setiap hari untuk masing-masing dari kelima shalat.'

149.iwh_en: It was narrated that a scholar said: 'The woman with abnormal bleeding should perform ghusl, then combine Dhuhr and Asr. If she sees something (discharge), she should perform ghusl again and combine Maghrib and Isha.'
149.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa seorang ulama berkata: 'Wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal harus mandi, kemudian menggabungkan Zuhur dan Ashar. Jika dia melihat sesuatu (keputihan), dia harus mandi lagi dan menggabungkan Maghrib dan Isya.'

150.iwh_en: It was narrated that Sa'id ibn al-Musayyab was asked about the woman with abnormal bleeding. He said: 'She should sit for the days of her normal menstrual period, then perform ghusl from one Dhuhr to the next, wrap herself in a cloth, and her husband may approach her.'
150.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan bahwa Sa'id ibn al-Musayyab ditanya tentang wanita dengan pendarahan abnormal. Dia berkata: 'Dia harus duduk selama hari-hari masa haid normalnya, kemudian mandi dari satu Zuhur ke Zuhur berikutnya, membalut diri dengan kain, dan suaminya boleh mendatanginya.'
